title: Compile-time meta execution flow
description: Reference ordering from parsed input through meta discovery, host execution of Beskid.Compiler-backed modules, incremental bookkeeping, and merge back into semantic work.

nodes.label: Source + compilation instance
nodes.description: Implicit current compilation (inputs, options, roots) available to meta scope.

nodes.label: Parse / syntax model
nodes.description: Produce syntax items and stable node identities for queries and invalidation keys.

nodes.label: Meta project manifest
nodes.description: Project.type Meta from Project.proj; attachment and entry wiring for event piping.

nodes.label: Meta discovery
nodes.description: Enumerate meta blocks, order deterministically, classify contributors vs inspectors.

nodes.label: Host execute meta
nodes.description: Run compile-time Beskid with injected Mod SDK; collect diagnostics and typed edits.

nodes.label: Incremental schedule
nodes.description: Update dependency graph; schedule reruns when upstream syntax or options change.

nodes.label: Apply contributions
nodes.description: Merge syntax edits, generated members, and diagnostic attachments into the working compilation.

nodes.label: Semantic + typecheck
nodes.description: Resume staged semantic pipeline on merged program shape.

edges.label: feeds
edges.description: Compilation instance supplies text, paths, and configuration to the parser front-end.

edges.label: classifies
edges.description: Workspace resolution surfaces Meta projects for host registration alongside compile roots.

edges.label: yields
edges.description: Stable syntax tree enables deterministic discovery of meta items.

edges.label: schedules
edges.description: Meta manifests determine which meta entrypoints receive compilation events.

edges.label: invokes
edges.description: Each meta block runs under host policy with explicit capability grants.

edges.label: registers
edges.description: Reads/writes are recorded for invalidation and replay guarantees.

edges.label: when clean
edges.description: After a quiescent round, contributions merge atomically into the syntax model.

edges.label: continues
edges.description: Semantic pipelines operate on the post-meta program view.
